title: Kanketsu Sasaki Kojirô: Ganryû-jima kettô
writer: Yumi Fujiki, Takeo Matsuura, Motozo Murakami
actors: Tomoemon Otani, Toshirô Mifune, Hisako Yamane
plot: Master swordsman Kojiro Sasaki is not content with the knowledge of his own power and constantly seeks to impress it upon others. Another great samurai swordsman, Musashi Miyamoto, has great respect for Sasaki's skills, but seeks ...
